_readme: PLACEHOLDER DATA — none of the entries below are real detections. Real SLSS shark-spotting program data (location/date/species) is NOT included here pending confirmation with KJR that AI First Nations may surface it in this tool — that program runs under the KJR Services Agreement, which assigns IP in engagement deliverables/data to KJR. Do not populate this file with real SLSS data until that's confirmed. See AIFN-Knowledge-Base wiki 'Drone Data Sovereignty Platform - Gap Analysis.md' for context.

sites.name: Placeholder Marine Monitoring Point 1
sites.notes: Placeholder entry only. Represents the kind of coastal monitoring point that would be logged during a real marine wildlife survey pass.

sites.name: Placeholder Coastal Watch Zone
sites.notes: Placeholder entry representing a general coastal wildlife monitoring zone, not a specific detection.
